title: Chapter 18 - SEO Basics
description: Questions about headings, meta description, and structure for search engines.

questions.prompt: What is the purpose of a meta description?

options.label: A short summary shown in search results

explanations.overview: Meta description provides a concise summary that search engines may display.

byOptionId.summary: Correct — meta descriptions are short summaries that can appear in search results.
byOptionId.style: Incorrect — meta descriptions do not style content.
byOptionId.indexonly: Incorrect — meta description does not prevent indexing; robots meta tags control indexing.
byOptionId.security: Incorrect — meta descriptions do not affect site security.

options.label: They provide structure and keywords for crawlers
They add ads to the page

explanations.overview: Proper headings help search engines understand content organization and relevance.

byOptionId.structure: Correct — headings convey structure and help crawlers and users understand content.
byOptionId.speed: Incorrect — headings do not directly affect load speed.
byOptionId.encrypt: Incorrect — headings do not encrypt content.
byOptionId.ads: Incorrect — headings are unrelated to ad insertion.
